mapper.select: SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_no, d.doc_title, d.total_amt, d.reg_dtime, c.company_name, c.addr_kor, c.company_phone, u.user_name, u.phone FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST d INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_MST o ON d.order_id = o.order_id INNER JOIN TB_USERS u ON d.owner_user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN TB_COMPANIES c ON u.company_cd = c.company_cd WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId} AND d.doc_type = 'TRANSACTION'

SELECT D.doc_id, D.doc_no, D.doc_title, D.total_amt, D.due_date, D.doc_content, D.reg_dtime, CO.company_name, CO.addr_kor, CO.company_phone, U.user_name, U.phone, OIL.fuel_nm, CT.cart_id, CT.total_qty, CT.total_price, OIL.base_unit_prc, CT.target_product_prc, CT.target_product_amt FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST D INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_MST O ON D.order_id = O.order_id INNER JOIN TB_USERS U ON O.user_no = U.user_no INNER JOIN TB_COMPANIES CO ON U.company_cd = CO.company_cd INNER JOIN TB_CART CT ON O.order_no = CT.order_no INNER JOIN TB_OIL_MST OIL ON CT.fuel_id = OIL.fuel_id WHERE D.order_id = #{orderId} AND D.doc_type = 'CONTRACT'
SELECT IFNULL( SUM(IFNULL(target_product_amt, total_price)), 0 ) FROM TB_CART WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT CONCAT(UPPER(#{typePrefix}), '-', T1.company_cd, '-', T1.curr_date, '-', T1.next_seq) AS docNo FROM ( SELECT IFNULL((SELECT company_cd FROM TB_USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}), 'GFT') AS company_cd, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AS curr_date, LPAD( IFNULL( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(doc_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST WHERE reg_dtime >= CURDATE() AND doc_no LIKE CONCAT(UPPER(#{typePrefix}), '-%') ), 0) + 1, 3, '0' ) AS next_seq ) T1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DOCUMENT_MST ( doc_no, doc_title, doc_type, order_id, owner_user_id, doc_content, total_amt, due_date, reg_id ) VALUES ( #{docNo}, #{docTitle}, #{docType}, #{orderId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{docContent}, #{totalAmt}, #{dueDate}, #{regId} )
mapper.select: SELECT doc_id, doc_no, doc_type, doc_title, total_amt, order_id, due_date, doc_content, reg_dtime FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
